senses.meaningEN: one part or feature of a situation

synonyms: dimension — 强调可分析的层面
d03-aspect.usageNote: 可数名词；谈“……的一个方面”用 an aspect of，不用 an aspect about。表达“从社会或经济角度”更自然地说 from a social or economic perspective。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The survey examines every aspect of student life.
examples.translationCN: 这项调查考察学生生活的各个方面。
examples.speakText: The survey examines every aspect of student life.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Elizabeth began to see another aspect of Darcy's character.
examples.translationCN: 伊丽莎白开始看到达西性格的另一个侧面。
examples.speakText: Elizabeth began to see another aspect of Darcy's character.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Energy security is one aspect of the global shift toward cleaner power.
examples.translationCN: 能源安全是全球转向更清洁能源的一个方面。
examples.speakText: Energy security is one aspect of the global shift toward cleaner power.

senses.meaningEN: something that influences a result

d03-factor.usageNote: 可数名词；factor in 强调“……中的因素”，factor behind 指背后成因。多个因素用 factors；influence 则可作可数或不可数名词。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Cost was an important factor in choosing the course.
examples.translationCN: 费用是选择这门课程时的一个重要因素。
examples.speakText: Cost was an important factor in choosing the course.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Weather became a decisive factor in Phileas Fogg's journey.
examples.translationCN: 天气成了斐利亚·福克旅程中的决定性因素。
examples.sourceTitle: Around the World in Eighty Days
examples.speakText: Weather became a decisive factor in Phileas Fogg's journey.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Battery cost remains a major factor in the adoption of electric vehicles.
examples.translationCN: 电池成本仍是电动汽车普及的一个主要因素。
examples.speakText: Battery cost remains a major factor in the adoption of electric vehicles.

senses.meaningEN: facts or signs showing that something is true

d03-evidence.usageNote: 通常不可数：说 some/a piece of evidence，不说 an evidence 或 evidences。evidence of 表示某事存在的迹象，evidence for 支持某观点。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The researchers found strong evidence of improved memory.
examples.translationCN: 研究人员发现了记忆力提高的有力证据。
examples.speakText: The researchers found strong evidence of improved memory.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Holmes studied each piece of evidence before naming the suspect.
examples.translationCN: 福尔摩斯在指出嫌疑人前研究了每一项证据。
examples.speakText: Holmes studied each piece of evidence before naming the suspect.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Satellite records provide evidence that many glaciers are retreating.
examples.translationCN: 卫星记录提供了许多冰川正在消退的证据。
examples.speakText: Satellite records provide evidence that many glaciers are retreating.

senses.meaningEN: a result, especially one caused by an action

d03-consequence.usageNote: 可数，常用复数 consequences 指不良后果；a consequence of 后接原因，as a consequence 表“因此”，是阅读中的因果标记。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Missing several lectures may have serious consequences for your grade.
examples.translationCN: 缺席多次讲座可能会对你的成绩造成严重后果。
examples.speakText: Missing several lectures may have serious consequences for your grade.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Victor slowly understood the terrible consequence of his experiment.
examples.translationCN: 维克多逐渐明白了他的实验所造成的可怕后果。
examples.speakText: Victor slowly understood the terrible consequence of his experiment.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Longer heat waves can be a consequence of a warming climate.
examples.translationCN: 更持久的热浪可能是气候变暖的后果。
examples.speakText: Longer heat waves can be a consequence of a warming climate.

senses.meaningEN: a suitable chance to do something

synonyms: chance — 更口语且可含偶然性
d03-opportunity.usageNote: 可数；优先用 opportunity to do something 或 opportunity for something。opportunity of doing 语法上可用，但较少见。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The exchange program gives students an opportunity to practise English abroad.
examples.translationCN: 交换项目给学生提供了在国外练习英语的机会。
examples.speakText: The exchange program gives students an opportunity to practise English abroad.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Jane welcomed the opportunity to begin an independent life at Thornfield.
examples.translationCN: 简欣然接受了在桑菲尔德开始独立生活的机会。
examples.speakText: Jane welcomed the opportunity to begin an independent life at Thornfield.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Low-cost satellites offer smaller nations new opportunities for Earth observation.
examples.translationCN: 低成本卫星为较小国家提供了地球观测的新机会。
examples.speakText: Low-cost satellites offer smaller nations new opportunities for Earth observation.

senses.meaningEN: ability or the maximum amount something can hold

synonyms: capability — 可实现某事的能力
d03-capacity.usageNote: 表示容量可数或不可数，常用 a capacity of + 数量；表示能力常用 capacity to do/for。at full capacity 表“满负荷”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The new library has a seating capacity of eight hundred.
examples.translationCN: 新图书馆可容纳八百人就座。
examples.speakText: The new library has a seating capacity of eight hundred.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Dorothy discovered her companions' capacity for courage along the road.
examples.translationCN: 多萝茜在旅途中发现了伙伴们勇敢的能力。
examples.speakText: Dorothy discovered her companions' capacity for courage along the road.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Many regions are expanding renewable-energy storage capacity.
examples.translationCN: 许多地区正在扩大可再生能源储存能力。
examples.speakText: Many regions are expanding renewable-energy storage capacity.

senses.meaningEN: force or worry produced by demands

d03-pressure.usageNote: 表示心理或社会压力通常不可数；pressure on somebody/to do something。under pressure 是固定搭配，不用 under the pressure，除非特指。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: She learned to remain calm under examination pressure.
examples.translationCN: 她学会了在考试压力下保持冷静。
examples.speakText: She learned to remain calm under examination pressure.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Under family pressure, Anne tried to hide the depth of her feelings.
examples.translationCN: 在家庭压力下，安妮试图隐藏自己深切的感情。
examples.speakText: Under family pressure, Anne tried to hide the depth of her feelings.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Growing electricity demand is putting pressure on aging power grids.
examples.translationCN: 不断增长的用电需求正给老化的电网带来压力。
examples.speakText: Growing electricity demand is putting pressure on aging power grids.

senses.meaningEN: a usual direction of change or way of behaving

synonyms: trend — 可观察的发展方向
d03-tendency.usageNote: 可数；a tendency to do 表行为倾向，a tendency toward(s) + 名词表发展方向。阅读中不等于必然结果，只表示概率偏向。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Some learners have a tendency to translate every sentence word for word.
examples.translationCN: 一些学习者倾向于逐字翻译每个句子。
examples.speakText: Some learners have a tendency to translate every sentence word for word.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Dorian's tendency to seek beauty gradually overcame his better judgment.
examples.translationCN: 道林追求美的倾向逐渐压过了他更明智的判断。
examples.speakText: Dorian's tendency to seek beauty gradually overcame his better judgment.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Remote work has strengthened the tendency toward flexible office arrangements.
examples.translationCN: 远程办公强化了采用灵活办公安排的趋势。
examples.speakText: Remote work has strengthened the tendency toward flexible office arrangements.

senses.meaningEN: the act of examining similarities and differences

d03-comparison.usageNote: 可数或不可数；comparison between A and B，comparison with/to something。by comparison 是篇章转折标记；beyond comparison 表“无与伦比”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: A comparison between the two surveys revealed a change in study habits.
examples.translationCN: 对两项调查的比较显示学习习惯发生了变化。
examples.speakText: A comparison between the two surveys revealed a change in study habits.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: In comparison with London, the country house seemed wonderfully quiet to Pip.
examples.translationCN: 与伦敦相比，那座乡间宅邸在匹普看来安静极了。
examples.speakText: In comparison with London, the country house seemed wonderfully quiet to Pip.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: International comparisons help cities evaluate their public transport systems.
examples.translationCN: 国际比较有助于城市评估其公共交通系统。
examples.speakText: International comparisons help cities evaluate their public transport systems.

senses.meaningEN: an important or noticeable characteristic
to include someone or something prominently

d03-feature.usageNote: 名词可数，a feature of；动词可及物，也可用 feature in 表“在……中担任重要部分”。阅读中 feature 不一定指“功能”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Group discussion is a central feature of the language course.
examples.translationCN: 小组讨论是这门语言课程的核心特色。
examples.speakText: Group discussion is a central feature of the language course.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: A locked room became the most puzzling feature of the case.
examples.translationCN: 一间上锁的房间成了案件中最令人费解的特征。
examples.speakText: A locked room became the most puzzling feature of the case.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: New smartphones increasingly feature tools that run artificial intelligence on the device.
examples.translationCN: 新款智能手机越来越多地配备在设备端运行人工智能的工具。
examples.speakText: New smartphones increasingly feature tools that run artificial intelligence on the device.

senses.meaningEN: the purpose or normal activity of something
to work or operate

d03-function.usageNote: 名词可数，function of 表用途；动词不及物，function as + 身份/用途，function well/properly。不要把 function 直接接宾语。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The introduction performs the important function of guiding the reader.
examples.translationCN: 引言发挥着引导读者的重要作用。
examples.speakText: The introduction performs the important function of guiding the reader.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The scarecrow hoped his new brain would function wisely in difficult moments.
examples.translationCN: 稻草人希望他的新脑子能在困难时刻明智地运转。
examples.speakText: The scarecrow hoped his new brain would function wisely in difficult moments.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Wetlands function as natural barriers against floods and storms.
examples.translationCN: 湿地发挥着抵御洪水和风暴的天然屏障作用。
examples.speakText: Wetlands function as natural barriers against floods and storms.

senses.meaningEN: a person, place, or thing from which something comes

d03-source.usageNote: 可数；a source of information/energy。学术写作中 source 指资料来源，必须判断 reliable/primary；不可把 resource 与 source 完全互换。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Students should identify the source of every statistic they use.
examples.translationCN: 学生应注明所用每项统计数据的来源。
examples.speakText: Students should identify the source of every statistic they use.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The traveller followed the stream in search of its hidden source.
examples.translationCN: 旅行者沿着溪流寻找它隐蔽的源头。
examples.speakText: The traveller followed the stream in search of its hidden source.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Solar power is now a rapidly expanding source of electricity in many countries.
examples.translationCN: 太阳能如今是许多国家迅速扩大的电力来源。
examples.speakText: Solar power is now a rapidly expanding source of electricity in many countries.

senses.meaningEN: a function, position, or character in a situation
senses.pattern: a role in; the role of

d03-role.usageNote: 可数；play a role in + 名词/动名词，the role of A in B。表示戏剧角色也用 role；不要写 play a role on。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Regular feedback plays an important role in language learning.
examples.translationCN: 定期反馈在语言学习中起重要作用。
examples.speakText: Regular feedback plays an important role in language learning.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Sydney Carton accepted a final role that demanded extraordinary courage.
examples.translationCN: 西德尼·卡顿接受了一个需要非凡勇气的最终角色。
examples.speakText: Sydney Carton accepted a final role that demanded extraordinary courage.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Public libraries play a growing role in improving digital access.
examples.translationCN: 公共图书馆在改善数字接入方面发挥着日益重要的作用。
examples.speakText: Public libraries play a growing role in improving digital access.

senses.meaningEN: a particular, systematic way of doing something

d03-method.usageNote: 可数；method of doing 或 method for doing，不用 method to do（正式写作中宜避免）。methodology 是方法体系，不是单个方法。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The teacher introduced a simple method for remembering new words.
examples.translationCN: 老师介绍了一种记忆新词的简单方法。
examples.speakText: The teacher introduced a simple method for remembering new words.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Holmes explained that careful observation was the foundation of his method.
examples.translationCN: 福尔摩斯解释说，细致观察是他方法的基础。
examples.speakText: Holmes explained that careful observation was the foundation of his method.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Wastewater monitoring has become a useful method for tracking disease trends.
examples.translationCN: 废水监测已成为追踪疾病趋势的一种有用方法。
examples.speakText: Wastewater monitoring has become a useful method for tracking disease trends.

senses.meaningEN: a basic rule, belief, or scientific truth

d03-principle.usageNote: 可数；principle 指原则，principal 指“主要的/负责人”。in principle 表“原则上”，on principle 表“基于原则”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Academic honesty is a basic principle of university life.
examples.translationCN: 学术诚信是大学生活的一项基本原则。
examples.speakText: Academic honesty is a basic principle of university life.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Jane refused to abandon her principles even when leaving Thornfield caused pain.
examples.translationCN: 即使离开桑菲尔德令她痛苦，简也拒绝放弃自己的原则。
examples.speakText: Jane refused to abandon her principles even when leaving Thornfield caused pain.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: The principle of human oversight guides many proposals for responsible artificial intelligence.
examples.translationCN: 人类监督原则指导着许多负责任人工智能的提案。
examples.speakText: The principle of human oversight guides many proposals for responsible artificial intelligence.

senses.meaningEN: a set of ideas intended to explain facts or events

d03-theory.usageNote: 可数；科学语境中 theory 是有证据支持的解释体系，不等于随意猜测。in theory 与 in practice 常构成对照。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The experiment allowed students to connect theory with practice.
examples.translationCN: 这项实验使学生能够把理论与实践联系起来。
examples.speakText: The experiment allowed students to connect theory with practice.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The professor formed a strange theory about the visitor's sudden disappearance.
examples.translationCN: 教授对访客的突然失踪提出了一个奇怪的理论。
examples.speakText: The professor formed a strange theory about the visitor's sudden disappearance.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: New telescope observations continue to test theories of how galaxies formed.
examples.translationCN: 新的望远镜观测持续检验有关星系如何形成的理论。
examples.speakText: New telescope observations continue to test theories of how galaxies formed.

senses.meaningEN: an abstract idea used to understand something

d03-concept.usageNote: 可数；the concept of + 名词。concept 是抽象概念，conception 还可表示理解方式；academic text 中 define/apply a concept 很常见。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The lecturer used a diagram to explain the concept of social mobility.
examples.translationCN: 讲师用图表解释社会流动这一概念。
examples.speakText: The lecturer used a diagram to explain the concept of social mobility.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The creature struggled with the human concept of justice.
examples.translationCN: 那个生物努力理解人类的正义观念。
examples.speakText: The creature struggled with the human concept of justice.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: The concept of a circular economy is shaping product design and recycling policy.
examples.translationCN: 循环经济的概念正影响产品设计和回收政策。
examples.speakText: The concept of a circular economy is shaping product design and recycling policy.

senses.meaningEN: surrounding words or facts that clarify meaning

d03-context.usageNote: 可数或不可数；in context 表“结合上下文”，out of context 表“脱离语境”；in the context of 用于限定讨论背景。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Readers can often guess an unfamiliar word from its context.
examples.translationCN: 读者常能根据语境猜出陌生词的意思。
examples.speakText: Readers can often guess an unfamiliar word from its context.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Without the context of Pip's childhood, his ambitions are hard to understand.
examples.translationCN: 不了解匹普童年的背景，就很难理解他的抱负。
examples.speakText: Without the context of Pip's childhood, his ambitions are hard to understand.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Media-literacy lessons teach people to examine images in their original context.
examples.translationCN: 媒介素养课程教人们在原始语境中审视图像。
examples.speakText: Media-literacy lessons teach people to examine images in their original context.

senses.meaningEN: a small fact or individual piece of information

d03-detail.usageNote: 单个细节可数，details 常指详细资料。in detail 无冠词；go into detail/details 表“详述”；detail 作动词意为列举说明。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Please describe the research procedure in detail.
examples.translationCN: 请详细描述研究步骤。
examples.speakText: Please describe the research procedure in detail.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: One tiny detail in the letter caught Holmes's attention.
examples.translationCN: 信中的一个微小细节引起了福尔摩斯的注意。
examples.speakText: One tiny detail in the letter caught Holmes's attention.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: High-resolution climate models reveal local details that global averages can hide.
examples.translationCN: 高分辨率气候模型揭示了全球平均值可能掩盖的局部细节。
examples.speakText: High-resolution climate models reveal local details that global averages can hide.

senses.meaningEN: one possible choice among several

d03-option.usageNote: 可数；have the option to do/of doing。option 是可选方案，choice 还可指选择行为；the only option 后常接 is to do。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Students have the option to submit the assignment online.
examples.translationCN: 学生可以选择在线提交作业。
examples.speakText: Students have the option to submit the assignment online.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: With few safe options remaining, the travellers continued through the night.
examples.translationCN: 由于几乎没有安全选择，旅行者们连夜继续前行。
examples.sourceTitle: Around the World in Eighty Days
examples.speakText: With few safe options remaining, the travellers continued through the night.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Night trains are returning as a lower-carbon travel option in parts of Europe.
examples.translationCN: 夜间列车正在欧洲部分地区重新成为一种低碳出行选择。
examples.speakText: Night trains are returning as a lower-carbon travel option in parts of Europe.

senses.meaningEN: a state or a requirement that must be met

d04-condition.usageNote: 表示状态时常用单数 in good/bad condition；表示环境或条款常用复数 conditions。on condition that 后接完整从句。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The laboratory equipment must be kept in good condition.
examples.translationCN: 实验室设备必须保持良好状态。
examples.speakText: The laboratory equipment must be kept in good condition.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The poor condition of the room made Jane's first night at Lowood uncomfortable.
examples.translationCN: 房间糟糕的状况让简在洛伍德的第一夜很不舒服。
examples.speakText: The poor condition of the room made Jane's first night at Lowood uncomfortable.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Sensors can report the condition of bridges before visible damage becomes severe.
examples.translationCN: 传感器能在可见损伤变严重前报告桥梁状况。
examples.speakText: Sensors can report the condition of bridges before visible damage becomes severe.

senses.meaningEN: a fact or condition affecting what happens

d04-circumstance.usageNote: 通常用复数 circumstances 指周围情况；under the circumstances 表“在这种情况下”，under no circumstances 置于句首要部分倒装。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Under these circumstances, the meeting should be postponed.
examples.translationCN: 在这些情况下，会议应该推迟。
examples.speakText: Under these circumstances, the meeting should be postponed.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Anne's feelings remained steady despite the painful circumstances of their separation.
examples.translationCN: 尽管分离的处境令人痛苦，安妮的感情依然坚定。
examples.speakText: Anne's feelings remained steady despite the painful circumstances of their separation.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Emergency cash programs can help families cope with circumstances beyond their control.
examples.translationCN: 紧急现金援助计划能帮助家庭应对无法控制的处境。
examples.speakText: Emergency cash programs can help families cope with circumstances beyond their control.

senses.meaningEN: the set of things happening at a particular time

d04-situation.usageNote: 可数，通常说 in a difficult situation。situation 指整体局面，circumstances 常指构成局面的外部条件。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The team discussed how to respond to the unexpected situation.
examples.translationCN: 团队讨论了如何应对意外情况。
examples.speakText: The team discussed how to respond to the unexpected situation.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Robinson carefully assessed his situation on the unfamiliar island.
examples.translationCN: 鲁滨逊仔细评估了自己在陌生岛屿上的处境。
examples.speakText: Robinson carefully assessed his situation on the unfamiliar island.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Shared satellite maps give rescue teams a clearer picture of a disaster situation.
examples.translationCN: 共享卫星地图让救援队更清楚地了解灾情。
examples.speakText: Shared satellite maps give rescue teams a clearer picture of a disaster situation.

senses.meaningEN: the reason for doing something or its intended use
senses.pattern: the purpose of; for the purpose of

d04-purpose.usageNote: 可数；the purpose of doing something，purpose in doing 也可表示做某事的意义。on purpose 表“故意地”，不可与 for a purpose 混淆。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The main purpose of the questionnaire is to collect student feedback.
examples.translationCN: 这份问卷的主要目的是收集学生反馈。
examples.speakText: The main purpose of the questionnaire is to collect student feedback.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Phileas Fogg travelled with a clear purpose and a strict timetable.
examples.translationCN: 斐利亚·福克带着明确目的和严格时间表出发。
examples.sourceTitle: Around the World in Eighty Days
examples.speakText: Phileas Fogg travelled with a clear purpose and a strict timetable.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Some cities are redesigning streets for the dual purpose of safety and cleaner travel.
examples.translationCN: 一些城市正在重新设计街道，以实现安全和清洁出行的双重目的。
examples.speakText: Some cities are redesigning streets for the dual purpose of safety and cleaner travel.

senses.meaningEN: something that improves the chance of success

d04-advantage.usageNote: 可数；an advantage over 对……的优势，the advantage of + 名词/动名词。take advantage of 可指“利用”，语境不同也可指“占便宜”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Living near campus has the advantage of reducing travel time.
examples.translationCN: 住在校园附近的好处是能减少通勤时间。
examples.speakText: Living near campus has the advantage of reducing travel time.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Alice used her small size as an advantage when passing through the tiny door.
examples.translationCN: 爱丽丝穿过小门时把身材小巧当作一种优势。
examples.speakText: Alice used her small size as an advantage when passing through the tiny door.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Heat pumps have the advantage of providing both heating and cooling.
examples.translationCN: 热泵的优势是既能供暖又能制冷。
examples.speakText: Heat pumps have the advantage of providing both heating and cooling.

senses.meaningEN: something that makes success more difficult
senses.pattern: a disadvantage of; at a disadvantage

d04-disadvantage.usageNote: 可数；the disadvantage of + 名词/动名词；be at a disadvantage 是固定搭配。disadvantaged 作形容词常指社会资源不足。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: A major disadvantage of online discussion is the lack of immediate feedback.
examples.translationCN: 线上讨论的一个主要缺点是缺少即时反馈。
examples.speakText: A major disadvantage of online discussion is the lack of immediate feedback.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Without money or connections, Pip believed he was at a social disadvantage.
examples.translationCN: 没有金钱或人脉，匹普认为自己处于社会劣势。
examples.speakText: Without money or connections, Pip believed he was at a social disadvantage.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Limited charging access remains a disadvantage for some electric-vehicle drivers.
examples.translationCN: 充电渠道有限仍是部分电动汽车驾驶者面临的不利条件。
examples.speakText: Limited charging access remains a disadvantage for some electric-vehicle drivers.

senses.meaningEN: a duty to deal with or be accountable for something

d04-responsibility.usageNote: 作“责任”可不可数；responsibility for + 名词/动名词，responsibility to do。be responsible for 与 take responsibility for 都接 for。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Each group member has responsibility for part of the presentation.
examples.translationCN: 每位小组成员都负责展示的一部分。
examples.speakText: Each group member has responsibility for part of the presentation.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Marmee taught her daughters to accept responsibility for their choices.
examples.translationCN: 马奇太太教女儿们为自己的选择承担责任。
examples.speakText: Marmee taught her daughters to accept responsibility for their choices.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Technology companies face growing responsibility for protecting users' personal data.
examples.translationCN: 科技公司在保护用户个人数据方面承担着日益增加的责任。
examples.speakText: Technology companies face growing responsibility for protecting users' personal data.

senses.meaningEN: something officially demanded or needed
senses.pattern: a requirement for; requirement to do

d04-requirement.usageNote: 可数；a requirement for admission，a requirement to do。meet/fulfil/satisfy a requirement，不说 reach a requirement。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Regular attendance is a requirement for completing the course.
examples.translationCN: 定期出勤是完成这门课程的一项要求。
examples.speakText: Regular attendance is a requirement for completing the course.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The strange requirement in the will changed the young man's future.
examples.translationCN: 遗嘱中的奇怪要求改变了那个年轻人的未来。
examples.speakText: The strange requirement in the will changed the young man's future.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Carbon reporting is becoming a standard requirement for large companies in several markets.
examples.translationCN: 在若干市场，碳排放报告正成为大型公司的标准要求。
examples.speakText: Carbon reporting is becoming a standard requirement for large companies in several markets.

senses.meaningEN: the way in which people or things are connected

synonyms: relation — 较正式或家族关系
d04-relationship.usageNote: 可数；relationship between A and B，relationship with a person/group。学术阅读中 correlation 不自动证明 causal relationship。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The study explores the relationship between sleep and academic performance.
examples.translationCN: 这项研究探讨睡眠与学业表现之间的关系。
examples.speakText: The study explores the relationship between sleep and academic performance.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The relationship between Elizabeth and Darcy changed as each questioned an early judgment.
examples.translationCN: 随着两人质疑最初的判断，伊丽莎白与达西的关系发生了变化。
examples.speakText: The relationship between Elizabeth and Darcy changed as each questioned an early judgment.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Researchers are examining the relationship between urban trees and lower summer temperatures.
examples.translationCN: 研究人员正在考察城市树木与较低夏季气温之间的关系。
examples.speakText: Researchers are examining the relationship between urban trees and lower summer temperatures.

senses.meaningEN: the way a person, animal, or system acts

synonyms: conduct — 较正式的人类行为
d04-behavior.usageNote: 通常不可数，英式拼写 behaviour；指不同类型时可用 behaviors（学术语境）。behaviour toward others，the behavior of a system。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The experiment measured changes in students' reading behavior.
examples.translationCN: 实验测量了学生阅读行为的变化。
examples.speakText: The experiment measured changes in students' reading behavior.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Dorian's secret behavior stood in sharp contrast to his youthful appearance.
examples.translationCN: 道林隐秘的行为与他年轻的外表形成鲜明对比。
examples.speakText: Dorian's secret behavior stood in sharp contrast to his youthful appearance.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Cities use travel data to understand how new rail lines change commuting behavior.
examples.translationCN: 城市利用出行数据了解新铁路线如何改变通勤行为。
examples.speakText: Cities use travel data to understand how new rail lines change commuting behavior.

senses.meaningEN: the sharing or transmission of information

d04-communication.usageNote: 表示交流过程通常不可数；communications 可指通信系统或行业。communication with 某人，between 多方；communicate something to somebody。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Clear communication helped the group finish its project on time.
examples.translationCN: 清晰的沟通帮助小组按时完成了项目。
examples.speakText: Clear communication helped the group finish its project on time.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: A failure of communication kept Jane and Rochester apart for too long.
examples.translationCN: 沟通的失败让简和罗切斯特分离了太久。
examples.speakText: A failure of communication kept Jane and Rochester apart for too long.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Low-orbit satellites are extending emergency communication to remote regions.
examples.translationCN: 低轨卫星正把应急通信扩展到偏远地区。
examples.speakText: Low-orbit satellites are extending emergency communication to remote regions.

senses.meaningEN: knowledge gained by doing, or an event lived through
to undergo or feel something

d04-experience.usageNote: “经验”不可数：gain experience；“一次经历”可数：an experience。动词直接接宾语，不说 experience in something 表“经历”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Volunteer work gave her valuable experience in organizing events.
examples.translationCN: 志愿工作给了她组织活动的宝贵经验。
examples.speakText: Volunteer work gave her valuable experience in organizing events.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Gulliver's unusual experiences changed his view of human society.
examples.translationCN: 格列佛不同寻常的经历改变了他对人类社会的看法。
examples.speakText: Gulliver's unusual experiences changed his view of human society.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Virtual laboratories give more students experience with scientific instruments.
examples.translationCN: 虚拟实验室让更多学生获得使用科学仪器的经验。
examples.speakText: Virtual laboratories give more students experience with scientific instruments.

senses.meaningEN: the power to affect people or events
to affect how someone thinks or what happens

d04-influence.usageNote: 名词可不可数，have an influence on；动词直接接宾语，不说 influence on something。influence 常指间接、逐渐作用。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Friends can have a strong influence on a student's study habits.
examples.translationCN: 朋友会对学生的学习习惯产生强烈影响。
examples.speakText: Friends can have a strong influence on a student's study habits.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Lord Henry's words exerted a dangerous influence on Dorian.
examples.translationCN: 亨利勋爵的话对道林产生了危险的影响。
examples.speakText: Lord Henry's words exerted a dangerous influence on Dorian.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Short-video platforms influence how many young people discover music and news.
examples.translationCN: 短视频平台影响着许多年轻人发现音乐和新闻的方式。
examples.speakText: Short-video platforms influence how many young people discover music and news.

senses.meaningEN: the quality or degree of being important

d04-importance.usageNote: 不可数；the importance of + 名词/动名词。attach importance to 中 to 是介词，后接名词或 doing；of great importance 等于 very important。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The workshop emphasized the importance of checking information sources.
examples.translationCN: 研讨会强调了核查信息来源的重要性。
examples.speakText: The workshop emphasized the importance of checking information sources.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Jo gradually understood the importance of patience in caring for her family.
examples.translationCN: 乔逐渐懂得耐心照顾家人的重要性。
examples.speakText: Jo gradually understood the importance of patience in caring for her family.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Recent droughts have highlighted the importance of efficient water management.
examples.translationCN: 近年的干旱凸显了高效水资源管理的重要性。
examples.speakText: Recent droughts have highlighted the importance of efficient water management.

senses.meaningEN: growth, progress, or a new event or product

d04-development.usageNote: 表示发展过程常不可数；表示新事态或房地产项目可数。development of a system，development in a field 指领域内的新进展。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The report traces the development of the university over fifty years.
examples.translationCN: 报告追溯了这所大学五十年来的发展。
examples.speakText: The report traces the development of the university over fifty years.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The development of Pip's character depended on painful self-knowledge.
examples.translationCN: 匹普性格的成长有赖于痛苦的自我认识。
examples.speakText: The development of Pip's character depended on painful self-knowledge.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Rapid development in battery chemistry is improving energy storage.
examples.translationCN: 电池化学的快速发展正在改善能源储存。
examples.speakText: Rapid development in battery chemistry is improving energy storage.

senses.meaningEN: the natural world or surrounding conditions

d04-environment.usageNote: 指自然环境常用 the environment，不可数；指具体工作/学习环境可数。environmental 是形容词，environmentally friendly 为固定搭配。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: A quiet learning environment can improve concentration.
examples.translationCN: 安静的学习环境能提高专注力。
examples.speakText: A quiet learning environment can improve concentration.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The wild environment of the moors shaped Jane's sense of freedom.
examples.translationCN: 荒野环境塑造了简对自由的感受。
examples.speakText: The wild environment of the moors shaped Jane's sense of freedom.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: A global treaty process is seeking ways to reduce plastic pollution in the environment.
examples.translationCN: 一项全球条约进程正在寻求减少环境中塑料污染的方法。
examples.speakText: A global treaty process is seeking ways to reduce plastic pollution in the environment.

senses.meaningEN: all people or organisms living in a particular area

synonyms: community — 有共同联系的群体
d04-population.usageNote: 集合名词；population of + 地区。人口多少用 large/small，不用 many/few；具体群体可用 populations。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The chart shows changes in the city's student population.
examples.translationCN: 图表显示了该市学生人口的变化。
examples.speakText: The chart shows changes in the city's student population.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Gulliver was astonished by the population of tiny Lilliputians.
examples.translationCN: 格列佛对小人国身材矮小的居民感到惊讶。
examples.speakText: Gulliver was astonished by the population of tiny Lilliputians.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: An aging population is increasing demand for accessible health and transport services.
examples.translationCN: 人口老龄化正在增加对无障碍医疗和交通服务的需求。
examples.speakText: An aging population is increasing demand for accessible health and transport services.

senses.meaningEN: people born at a similar time, or the production of something

d04-generation.usageNote: 可数；a generation of people，from generation to generation 无冠词。科技语境中 generation 也指“代”或“产生”，如 power generation。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Each generation develops its own ways of using language.
examples.translationCN: 每一代人都会形成自己使用语言的方式。
examples.speakText: Each generation develops its own ways of using language.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The old family story passed from one generation to the next.
examples.translationCN: 这个古老的家族故事代代相传。
examples.speakText: The old family story passed from one generation to the next.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: A new generation of reusable rockets is lowering some launch costs.
examples.translationCN: 新一代可重复使用火箭正在降低部分发射成本。
examples.speakText: A new generation of reusable rockets is lowering some launch costs.

senses.meaningEN: the process of teaching, learning, and developing knowledge

d04-education.usageNote: 通常不可数；an education 可指某人接受的一段教育。education in a subject，education for a purpose；educational 是“教育性的”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Higher education can provide both knowledge and practical skills.
examples.translationCN: 高等教育既能提供知识，也能培养实践技能。
examples.speakText: Higher education can provide both knowledge and practical skills.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Jane regarded education as a path toward independence.
examples.translationCN: 简把教育视为通往独立的道路。
examples.speakText: Jane regarded education as a path toward independence.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Open online courses are widening access to education in many languages.
examples.translationCN: 开放在线课程正在扩大人们以多种语言接受教育的机会。
examples.speakText: Open online courses are widening access to education in many languages.

senses.meaningEN: a belief or custom passed from one generation to another

d04-tradition.usageNote: 可数或不可数；a tradition of doing，by tradition 表“按照传统”。traditional 不一定等于 old-fashioned，阅读中常与 innovation 对照。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The university has a long tradition of welcoming international students.
examples.translationCN: 这所大学有欢迎国际学生的悠久传统。
examples.speakText: The university has a long tradition of welcoming international students.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The March family preserved a tradition of giving despite having little money.
examples.translationCN: 尽管钱不多，马奇一家仍保留着助人的传统。
examples.speakText: The March family preserved a tradition of giving despite having little money.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Digital archives help communities preserve oral traditions for future generations.
examples.translationCN: 数字档案帮助社区为后代保存口述传统。
examples.speakText: Digital archives help communities preserve oral traditions for future generations.
